title: People Operations Associate
description: We're hiring a People Operations Associate at CBRE. This is an exciting opportunity to join our transaction-focused, market-driven, global team and make a direct impact on our mission. If you have 1-2 years years of experience and are passionate about Commercial Real Estate, we'd love to hear from you.
responsibilities: Support recruitment and onboarding processes for new hires
Maintain personnel files and manage HR information systems
Process employee transactions including benefits and payroll
Organize company events and employee engagement activities
Assist with compliance documentation and employee relations
Provide administrative support to HR team and business units

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in HR or related field
